textByHashes.40b1d4a4d59a26b1f98e368a537a10a547c7e22e: Forgive me exile, though I can't allow you to board my ship.
textByHashes.48e07b45cf07c3e22ca48f4f69e5ed9e516c11e9: Very well... for old times sake.
textByHashes.c6963ce814c2ba660a06e7381b9fd37da2ed471d: Do you wish to return to Rellekka?
textByHashes.2c3e55fea0b8876c0a70274d98c49166731b848c: Very well, but do make sure you're not spotted leaving my ship.
textByHashes.80ee5dfc69c325b7e6a0c9fc0fa69577549f6f45: No, outerlander, I have never had the honour to be asked.
textByHashes.91f02899d2059f870557db35980d5d5cb66b6570: I am but a lowly warrior, fighting for my people wherever threats may appear against us...
textByHashes.be3dc814f75bf44aa0c895fcd5cae2fbb3071189: So what do you want from me, outerlander?
textByHashes.54d68cdb6d6988886183d6ade139a044aa9303b0: What do you want from me outerlander? It is our policy not to associate with those not of our tribe.
textByHashes.43dbe1df4aba11f4daee5ccc3dff676e0e27477f: I don't rightly understand your speech outerlander, but my loyalty is with Chieftain Brundt.
textByHashes.fc484f552fe7dfc063bf5ac18542a88f289e687d: He resides in our longhall; it is the large building over there, you should speak to him for he speaks for us all.
textByHashes.1dde95e57684525b5cdaa4dbf124a3aa1421c426: This should not concern you, outerlander. I am awaiting other Fremenniks to join me on an expedition to Waterbirth Island.
textByHashes.c9bec9e1fc0edcc82adbca78340cf5a33fb051eb: It is a small crescent-shaped island just north-west of here, outerlander.
textByHashes.25432187bd9ae587be82e8398a7d7b5b9199e702: We have many legends about it, such as the tale of the broken sky, and the day of the green seas.
textByHashes.1bbdbbed1f88a574e46550f3de206b7c574805cb: The reason I am travelling there is more serious Fremennik business, however. I doubt an outerlander would be interested.
textByHashes.b338404e27002947006ad1a1f0531465452db6c6: An outerlander join us on an honoured hunt???
textByHashes.c96f3c5e797c9b1278f1199f24cad54a06819f1b: Well.... I guess... I might be able to allow you to join us, although it is a breach of many of our customs...
textByHashes.33bea0f535343f649672d91cce3ec07816769f8b: Well... I remain unconvinced that it would be wise to allow an outerlander to join us in such dangerous battle, but your enthusiasm seems genuine enough...
textByHashes.8174441d6d0071902027b0b80d04d48826d58f4c: I will allow you to escort us, but you must pay me a sum of money first.
textByHashes.5f04bd8a3e62e5314fb8fa75743ee3f1c512cd9c: Ah, the outerlanders have stolen from my people for many years, in this way you can help my community with a small amount of money...
textByHashes.6fa4376c72d61adcd5008d3ff633165b0e23f357: Let us say... 1,000 coins. Payable in advance, of course.
textByHashes.8e163529e90900793cd29b44db8d49f0e7679a94: For this I will take you to Waterbirth Island on my boat, and will bring you back here when you have had your fill of the hunt. Assuming you are still alive to wish to leave, of course.
textByHashes.f963fd0dbac0dc457a5cb6c6216589ab5659db17: So do you have the 1,000 coins for my service, and are you ready to leave now?
textByHashes.7a8cb3f57b0415f277e9552292a708f0b1f2366e: I suggest you head to the cave with some urgency outerlander, the cold air out here might be too much for the likes of you...
textByHashes.196c1f17244d75acd110e412f3d49085c3977a42: As you wish. Come and see me when your bloodlust needs sating.
textByHashes.76e21ac562a2bc108b7ea09c1d3a7edd100b40f4: It is actually a helm, outerlander, but the sentiment is appreciated nonetheless.
textByHashes.2122d007a2cee4396a659940c614691b922e1d02: Have you had your fill of the hunt and wish to return, or are you still feeling the joy of the cull?
textByHashes.c1aad9a3324018d87d9e9f8c7e159be832d5ff67: Then let us away; There will be death to bring here another day!
textByHashes.8ca47cb227952f88bed63108bc71184667902e18: Ha Ha Ha! A true huntsman at heart!
textByHashes.0eea1eb2056580349b5219b35142fd74cc689ab4: I myself have killed over a hundred of the dagger- mouths, and did not think it too many!
textByHashes.e7694b9b51b54c88c14718ae1de8bbb78858f5c0: Ah, and what a glorious name that is! Worthy of only the finest warriors!
textByHashes.e191526ad6d78a46b273d44c2dee161c14c6e830: So what brings you back to fair Rellekka? It has been too long since you have drunk in the longhall with us and sang of your battles!
textByHashes.f5783cedb6d32b7def643b17025cab0e31d45c09: You have not heard, ? I am leading an expedition to Waterbirth Island!
textByHashes.62f6df2201cf34b5db9bd4c6ad1e9d09eae5d7ad: You have not ever travelled to Waterbirth Island, ? I am surprised, it is a place of outstanding natural beauty.
textByHashes.f24561757e1e27f6bbe55afff3258cb4b29d8f49: Or at least it used to be! But things have now changed...
textByHashes.ba5d15fc4cadd180b326a2a41ce2cc1034ad5f9c: It seems as though the sea-beasts known to us as the dagger-mouths have begun their hatching once again... And there may be others of their ilk there too.
textByHashes.2280729e3fdae9ecd4303158ae721839169bd119: Aye, the dagger-mouths! The vile creatures lived near here once, but we had thought them all driven back to the ocean depths many moons past.
textByHashes.70020cc9a018bb65b4796a76c134ac7b711e4730: I can only imagine a dagger-mouth queen has nested somewhere nearby, and spawned her foul brood under the sea once more, and some of them have migrated to fair Waterbirth Island.
textByHashes.696a5966b003c5966e7dfd36fcfb9c864a225b4b: You wound us with your questioning, !
textByHashes.ab67afa8aa282a733ff2e46ea2c959f47a3dff98: We are glad the dagger-mouths have returned to these shores, for it means we will get the chance to hunt them once again as our ancestors did!
textByHashes.a73f1d12b8f972ffe159c53035e857b0cf5f852b: When treated in the correct manner, the creatures' remains can be used to make fine battleworthy armour!
textByHashes.4ba39d23ec7a794173f5c569c4f168eda162fcdc: Of course, ! Your presence is more than welcome on this cull! You wish to leave now?
textByHashes.6fad2bf3c21f8d7633b58b246ab1bba4c5e65fd5: Aye, that it is ! Skulgrimen fashioned it for me from the carcass of one of the monsters on Waterbirth Island after our last hunt!
textByHashes.eca27796a70a3aeebfaccf72518f6960684fdf36: I hope to kill enough creatures to fashion some fine armour as well when next we leave!
textByHashes.094f8bc061612bb2a2f200c78719d663250873ae: Ah yes... The dagger-mouths' skin makes a good basis for many types of armour!
textByHashes.5b25e86b15999ab41f552c3a4ac98590abeffca0: Skulgrimen has made many sturdy helms from shells like that!
textByHashes.db6e70ae9f83045202c461b0614808c35a20548a: Skulgrimen once made a fine set of body armour from that kind of shell!
textByHashes.6cd98e371985c567841d45b2fa1dae452157d651: Aha! That could be made into some fine leg armour by Skulgrimen, I'll wager!
textByHashes.8454cb793a3e2f9fa2bb494d8748a28aa87ff72a: Hmmmm... I believe Peer could make a fine seers helm with that...
textByHashes.a2ba99c7d51b521294b0d3d6cea7a4e640cc8db3: Many moons past, Peer had some fine bodyarmour made from just such bones.
textByHashes.8668183cca0f294144a058aa6e26bd62dd2411ed: Peer could use that to make some mighty robes, I'll wager.
textByHashes.140300020cc5da801e74dcada5b742fb66789c0c: Sigli might be able to make you some sturdy headgear with that!
textByHashes.ddca195a57b7cc1bd6db9fa36319b2365edf7503: That could make a fine piece of hunting armour, if I know Sigli like I think I do.
textByHashes.52a1ca25d9bd1a777da9027a3f485df00358fd35: I'll wager Sigli can make that into some hunting legs for you.
textByHashes.84cc2f691580fab0f95c854a44ce850b2d08e066: Ah, it is always a pleasure ! Now did you want something more from me?
textByHashes.722e31c194c234179aadce64222a4563ef31d590: Ah, ! Such glorious battle makes you feel glad of life, does it not?
textByHashes.d38b1b60f5d3a05c16497d76e9929f40f0c5a22d: So what say you, stay here for the hunt, or return home to sweet Rellekka to feast and drink with your tribe?
textByHashes.a23851776deb8bdcb88dd1b8783f44d58965065b: Thank you, but I have no need for that!
textByHashes.c445fb3a7776fc097ea788d0899fad597cd023c1: I shouldn't do this... but for old times sake.
textByHashes.5d092557aa0ad7aeea9888b26983ffea2e47424a: Quickly . Once you arrive, leave my ship and make sure you're not spotted!
